addFinancier(address).details: Only the FINANCE role can call processRedemption().

params.financier: The address of the financier to add.

approveRedemption(address,uint8,uint256,.details: This is a cross-chain callback triggered from redeem().Must be operator.Does not transfer collateral or burn tokens. See processRedemption().

params.amountApproved: The approved redemption amount in collateral.
params.collateral: The address of the collateral to be returned.
params.error_: Error message returned by the Solana treasury.
params.tokenId_: The id of the token being redeemed.

assignOperator(address).details: If an existing operator exists, their role is revoked.

cancelDeposit(address).details: Must be owner, OPERATOR_ROLE, or the depositor.Returns collateral held into escrow back to the depositor.Destroys the Deposit record.

params.depositor: The depositor address of Depositt record.

cancelRedemption(address).details: Must be owner, OPERATOR_ROLE, or the redeemer.Returns USDM tokens held into escrow back to the redeemer.Destroys the Deposit record.

cancelSwap(address).details: Must be owner, OPERATOR_ROLE, or the swapper.Returns USDM input tokens held into escrow back to the swapper.Destroys the Swap record.

deposit(address,uint256,uint8).details: Open to all addresses, however downstream in Solana      the address must be whitelisted.Immediately transfers collateral into escrow to be held by this contract.Triggers a cross-chain message.Create a Deposit record.

params.collateral: The address of the collateral deposited.
params.tokenId: The id of the USDM token requested.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

processDeposit(address,address,uint256,u.details: Must be operator.This is a cross-chain callback triggered from deposit()Transfers collateral to the beneficiary account for processing by finance.Mints USDM tokens to the depositor.Destroys the Deposit record.

params.collateral: The address of the collateral being deposited.
params.depositor: The depositor address of the Deposit record.
params.error_: Error message returned by the Solana treasury.
params.tokenId_: The id of the token to be received.

processRedemption(address).details: Must be operator.Transfers collateral to the redeemer.Burnd the USDM tokens.Destroys the Redemption record.

processSwap(address,uint8,uint256,uint8,.details: Must be operator.This is a cross-chain callback triggered from deposit()Mints USDM output tokens to the swapper.Burns USDM input tokens.Destroys the Swap record.We expect swaps to occur often and thus no event is emitted.

params.amount: The amount of input token to be swapper.
params.error_: Error message returned by the Solana treasury.
params.inputTokenId: The id of the input token.
params.outputTokenId: The id of the output token.
params.swapper: The swapper address of the Swap record.

redeem(uint8,uint256,address).details: Open to all addresses, however downstream in Solana      the address must not be blacklisted.Returns collateral held into escrow back to the redeemer.Destroys the Deposit record.

params.amount: The amount of USDM token to be redeemed.
params.collateral: The address of the collateral to be reeived.
params.tokenId: The id of the USDM token.

params.financier: The address of the financier to remove.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

params.amount: The amount of USDM token to be swapped.
params.inputTokenId: The id of the USDM token. The outputTokenId is inferred.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

FINANCE_ROLE().notice: The finance role is a unique role that can execute the         processRedemption() method

OPERATOR_ROLE().notice: The operator role is a unique role that can execute the         cross-chain callback methods:         processDeposit() and approveRedemption()

addCollateral(address).notice: Adds a collateral to the list of accepted collaterals.

addFinancier(address).notice: Add a financier with role FINANCE.

approveRedemption(address,uint8,uint256,.notice: Approve an existing redemption for a certain amount.

assignBeneficiary0(address).notice: Assigns the address of the beneficiary account for         the collateral collected for USDM0.

assignBeneficiary1(address).notice: Assigns the address of the beneficiary account for         the collateral collected for USDM1.

assignUSDM0(address).notice: Assigns the address of the USDM0 token.

assignUSDM1(address).notice: Assigns the address of the USDM1 token.

constructor.notice: Set the owner to be the deployer

pause().notice: Pauses the broker. When paused the broker will not accept         new deposits or redemptions.

processDeposit(address,address,uint256,u.notice: Process an existing redemption for a certain amount.

processRedemption(address).notice: Process an existing redemption for a certain amount.

removeCollateral(address).notice: Removes a collateral from the list of accepted collaterals;

swapTokens(uint8,uint256).notice: Swap one USDM token for another.
